question: Under what condition would a UA not have to be registered before it is operated?

options.text: When the aircraft weighs less than 250g on takeoff, including everything that is onboard or attached to the aircraft.
When the aircraft has a takeoff weight that is more than 250g, but less than 250g when not including fuel and necessary attachments.
All aircraft need to be registered regardless of the weight of the aircraft before, during, or after the flight.
